name: Emulated Face Tracking
description: Drives facial expressions from microphone audio using on-device DSP (Goertzel band energy + ZCR vowel classification, mapped to ARKit blendshapes). Runs entirely on the CPU — no GPU or external service required.
author: VRCFaceTracking
usageInstructions: Pick a microphone in module settings, then enable the module. Speak normally — the module synthesises lip and jaw motion from audio without any tracking hardware.
